log: === INITIATIVE ===

=== ROUND 1 ===

Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 36/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 22/67
⚡ Githzerai — Unarmored Caster casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:17 total 27 vs AC 15 — still hits.
--- Githzerai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Githzerai — Unarmored Caster casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Githzerai — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Githzerai — Unarmored Caster for 8. HP: 30/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Githzerai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Githzerai — Unarmored Caster casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 10 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Githzerai — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Githzerai — Unarmored Caster for 9. HP: 39/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 19/67
→ Concentration save: [24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Githzerai — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
